---
title: "Emergent Intelligence"
subtitle: "Latest Simulation Logs & Research Notes"
listing:
  contents: 
    - "projects/ants/**/*.qmd"
    - "projects/cellular_automata/**/*.qmd"
    - "projects/immune_system/**/*.qmd"
    - "projects/spiking_neural_networks/**/*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  categories: true
---
